nodes.title: Note

properties.text:
QR Stereogram Workflow — DepthForge v0.5
Generates a scannable QR code that is simultaneously a viewable stereogram.
Scan the LEFT portion of the output with any QR reader. Cross-fuse all copies to see 3D depth.

widgets_values:
QR Stereogram Workflow — DepthForge v0.5
Generates a scannable QR code that is simultaneously a viewable stereogram.
Scan the LEFT portion of the output with any QR reader. Cross-fuse all copies to see 3D depth.

nodes.title: Note

properties.text:
Tips for best results:
• Use error_correction=H for depth_factor > 0.10
• module_size 10 px = good balance of scan + depth
• safe_mode ON caps shifts at module_size/4
• Shorter URLs → smaller QR → more depth headroom
• Connect DF_DepthPrep → depth_map for custom 3D shapes

widgets_values:

nodes.title: Note

properties.text:
Scan tip:
Point your phone camera at the
QR Code Only preview (left tile).
This is the clean, unshifted copy.

View tip:
Cross-fuse or parallel-fuse all 4 copies
till they merge — a 3D shape emerges.

nodes.title: Note

properties.text:
Optional depth path:
LoadImage → DF_DepthPrep → DF_QRStereogram depth_map

Connect the depth_map output from DF_DepthPrep
to the depth_map input on DF_QRStereogram
to encode a custom 3D shape.
